description: Configure strict efficiency measures for a new Vicidial campaign to prevent agent idling. Create and configure a campaign with ID 'FASTTRACK' and name 'Fast Track Outbound' (Active: Y, Dial Method: RATIO, Auto Dial Level: 1.0). The campaign must enforce a 30-second disposition limit using a custom status 'DISPTO' (Name: 'Disposition Timeout', Selectable: N, Human Answer: N). Additionally, set 'Wrapup Seconds' to 5 and 'Agent Pause After Each Call' to N.
